text: >> Hello? >> Yes. >> Hello. Good afternoon. This is Alyssa. I'm calling because there are pending grocery and cash benefits worth up to $300 available on your Medicare account through Florida State Relief Program. So, have you received any notification about these benefits yet? >> No, but how many times am I going to tell you? I don't live in Florida. Bye.
